Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 815

MUSC814 Doctoral Opera Techniques IV (2 Credits)

Continuation of MUSC813. Techniques for opera performance: Scene Study IV; Dance II; Movement IV; and methodology seminar. Prerequisite: MUSC813; and permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

Credit Only Granted for. MUSC614 or MUSC814.
